positions.title: Bitcoin Up or Down - June 29, 2:45PM-3:00PM ET
Bitcoin Up or Down - June 29, 2:30PM-2:45PM ET

last_violations.description: 15m up-mid below nested 5m up-mid: P(up_15m) cannot be < P(up_5m) for overlapping window

note.summary: Only 2 settled trades exist (both losses, -10 USD total PnL, 0% win rate), with every learned_pnl_by_bucket and selectivity bucket at n=2<<8 or min_samples=30, rendering all regime/z-score/conviction patterns pure noise with no confirmed positive EV. Signal learning and edge_vs_5min_outcome remain observe-only with zero accepted trades and near-random RSI accuracy (0.4868). No patterns meet confirmation criteria.
warnings: Counterfactual shows no selectivity impact yet
changes_since_last: No prior_analysis supplied; baseline is first observation
focus_next: Accumulate until n>=30 in any rsi_trend or gate bucket
Track whether any selectivity bucket crosses Wilson upper > breakeven

note.summary: The bot has virtually no trading activity: only 2 legacy fills (both losses, 0% win rate, -$10 PnL). 11,809 candidates were created, but 11,701 were rejected before execution and all 12 sent to the execution gate were rejected (underdog_price_below_floor). No edge is demonstrated; the data shows a broken execution pipeline, not a tradable signal.

knob_recommendations.reason: All 12 execution gate rejects were underdog_price_below_floor; lower threshold to 0.40 to allow ANY candidates through and collect edge data
9,334 candidates skipped due to directional_disabled; enable to test if directional rejection logic is too aggressive
Zero confidence tier samples; lower threshold from likely 0.60+ to 0.50 to capture more labeled edge model data
Create bypass flag to temporarily ignore underdog floor and diagnose if pipeline can generate ANY accepted candidates

new_lessons.rule: If 100% of execution gate candidates are rejected by a single rule (underdog_price_below_floor), the floor is miscalibrated or market conditions never meet itârelax threshold or add bypass
With N=2 legacy trades (0% win rate) and zero new accepted trades, no edge exists in any context; all exploit_contexts must remain empty until Nâ¥100 with win_rateâ¥60%
1,038 directional rejects + 9,334 directional_disabled skips = 88% of all candidates never reach scoring; investigate if directional filter is eliminating all signal or protecting from noise
1,535 valid TradingView alerts received but 0 settled trades with signal; signal pipeline is observe-only and contributes zero edgeâeither integrate or remove to reduce noise
RSI trend hit rate 48% (below 50% coin flip), prediction accuracy 48.7%âthis feature has no predictive power and should be deprioritized or removed from edge model

lessons.rule: No execution gate decisions = no edge signal; must first enable candidate flow to accumulate settled trades before any context filtering
Multiple restrict-only gates (down_bias, context, signal) configured but no base trading activity; gates can only obscure edge discovery when zero trades flow
All features missing (hurst, half_life, zscore, kalman) on 5/12 candidates; insufficient lookback or data pipeline issue blocks feature engineering before edge assessment
9,914 candidates with 0 executions = no empirical edge measurement; directional_disabled and series_not_allowed gates block all learningâmust enable to collect labeled outcomes
All execution_gate rejects were underdog_price_below_floor; if tightening up_underdog_entry_max does not yield fills, the edge model is miscalibrated
87 skips via directional_series_not_allowed with down_bias_gate enabled suggests combinatorial over-blocking; audit block_up_* rules for redundancy
64/90 missing_data events were hurst:insufficient_returns; if Hurst is mission-critical, increase lookback or soften hurst_regime gates
No fills = no edge evidence. All gate logic is speculative until settled trades exist.
2/2 execution candidates rejected for underdog_price_below_floor; current floor (likely 0.50) too conservativeâlower to 0.45-0.48 for bounded exploration without risk
With 0% exploration in down_bias_gate and context_gate, blocked contexts never sample. Enable 5% to validate priors.

0 accepted trades = 0 evidence of edge; expand sample or abandon strategy

100% of execution-gate candidates (2/2) rejected for underdog_price_below_floor â current floor may be too aggressive or market never offers acceptable underdog prices; lower cautiously to test
